_comment: TASK SPEC TEMPLATE — copy this file, rename it, fill in the fields. Delete _comment before running.
title: Human-readable title of the task
profile: Node/TypeScript Backend | React/TypeScript Frontend | Node/TypeScript Full-Stack
tech: Node.js, TypeScript, Express, PostgreSQL, Prisma 6, Zod, Vitest, React 18, Vite, CSS Modules, Axios
keyConstraints: TypeScript strict mode, Zod validation server-side, .nullish() not .optional().nullable(), Prisma selects must include all returned fields (jobInclude is source of truth), no UI component libraries, CSS Modules only
description: One paragraph. What needs to be built and why. Include the user-facing goal and any key constraints not covered above.
acceptanceCriteria: Max 6 items. Each must be independently testable.
Be specific: include endpoint path, HTTP method, field names, status codes.
Backend criteria: route, Zod validation, response shape { data: ... } or { error: string }.
Frontend criteria: component name, user action, expected outcome.
Always include: npx tsc --noEmit passes with no errors.
implementationNotes: Patterns to follow or pitfalls to avoid.
Reference existing code by name: jobInclude, adminOrDispatcher, axiosInstance.
Prisma: after schema change run npx prisma generate before starting server.
Zod: use z.nativeEnum() for enums, z.string().min(1) for FK fields (not z.string().cuid()).
Do not rewrite working code — only add what is missing.
securityConsiderations: Optional. List specific threats: e.g. ensure createdById is taken from JWT not request body, never return passwordHash, rate limit this endpoint.
